steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The first sentence (“Why do black-footed cats purr but leopards roar?”) and the final two sentences (“These traits allow leopards and most other species of big cats to produce powerful roars.” and “The same traits may also prevent most big cats from purring.”) bookend the explanation.

The decisive clue is the word “may,” indicating a hypothesis about the hyoid bone explaining the vocal differences.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
D captures the hypothesis-driven explanation by linking hyoid differences to the purr-vs-roar distinction.

A and B focus on details (specific traits in hyoids).

C misrepresents the passage’s tone of active hypothesis with “uncertain.” That is the correct answer.
